payload.content: Acme Corp signed for the Team plan. Annual contract. Renewal expected Q3 2026. Decision-maker: Sarah Chen (VP Engineering).
Prospect at BetaTech wants SSO and SOC 2 docs before procurement signs off. Procurement contact: David Kim (david.kim@betatech.io). Tech eval ongoing with their platform team.

Q1 expansion call with Sarah. They're spinning up a new internal copilot team and want 5 more seats by end of March. Sarah confirmed she'll be the budget owner. Mentioned Acme acquired BluePeak last quarter — possible expansion vector if BluePeak engineering ends up in scope.
Sarah Chen prefers Tuesday 10am PT meetings, capped at 30 minutes. Don't schedule on Mondays — internal board day.

Cirrus Robotics churned at end of January. Reason: pricing concerns — felt the per-subject metering didn't align with their fleet-wide robotics use case. Closing exec: their previous CTO Liam Park, since departed.

Demo with BetaTech platform team. Feedback: liked the provenance and ranking explanation, want to see a worked SLA-breach scenario in our next demo, asked whether handoff packs work with their Linear integration. Action items: send SOC 2 doc set + draft a Linear-handoff workflow.
SOC 2 Type II report sent to BetaTech (David Kim) on 2026-03-08. Pending their legal review; David estimated 2-3 weeks turnaround.

Delta Health discovery call. HIPAA-regulated workload — they need a BAA before any PoC. Tech contact: Dr. Janelle Martinez (CMIO). Use case: internal triage assistant memory across patient encounters. Will require careful PII handling story.
Delta Health security questionnaire received — 84 questions. Forwarded to security team for response by 2026-03-29. BAA template requested in parallel.

Win-back signal: Cirrus's new VP Engineering, Zara Patel, posted on LinkedIn about 'rebuilding our AI memory layer after a false start.' Reached out — she remembers our 2025 evaluation and is open to a re-eval call.

Re-eval call with Zara. New use case: per-robot memory (not per-customer), so the per-subject metering is now a fit. Zara mentioned competitor Mem0 quoted lower but lacked deterministic ranking — that's the wedge. Next step: kickoff scope call 2026-04-08.
Pricing approval received: Acme negotiated a 15% volume discount on the 5-seat expansion. Approved by Marco (AE). Signed order form expected by 2026-04-12.
Acme expansion closed: 5 seats added (Team plan), 15% volume discount. New ARR contribution: ~$24k annualized. Renewal still tracked for Q3 2026 — expansion does NOT reset renewal date.
Cirrus kickoff scope call. Scope: 200-robot pilot, EU region. Zara confirmed they want a 60-day PoC against measurable success criteria (recall@5 on prior-state retrieval). Marco assigned as AE.
Delta security questionnaire returned (all 84 questions answered). Outstanding items: BAA still in legal review on our side, target turnaround 2026-04-25. Janelle understanding.

payload.author: tom
payload.content: Personal preference reminder: I work in HubSpot exclusively. Don't suggest Salesforce playbooks, fields, or workflows when helping me — translate them into HubSpot equivalents.

payload.author: tom
payload.content: Communication preference: use email for prospects (especially procurement contacts), Slack only for internal coordination. Sarah Chen and David Kim both explicitly said email-only.
BetaTech legal cleared SOC 2 review. Now in pricing discussions — David asked for a 20% multi-year discount; pushed back to 12% over 2 years. Order form expected 2026-05-10.
BAA approved by our legal team; sent to Delta. Janelle confirmed receipt. PoC kickoff dependent on Delta's counter-signature — ETA 2026-05-05.

payload.author: tom
payload.content: AE handoffs: Marco is the AE on Acme + Cirrus. Priya M. is the AE on BetaTech + Delta Health. When prepping handoff packs, route to the right AE.

Pipeline summary going into May: $94k ARR closing this quarter (Acme expansion closed +$24k, BetaTech expected +$48k by 2026-05-10, Cirrus PoC pending conversion +$22k). Delta Health PoC starts 2026-05-05; conversion not yet forecast.

Casual check-in with Sarah. She mentioned BluePeak engineering integration is happening sooner than expected — possible 10-seat opportunity Q3, alongside renewal. Asked her to introduce me to BluePeak's eng lead. She'll send intro this week.
